youtube_items.summary: [Music] Well, good morning. I'm Ken Bibbery and welcome to Coffee with Ken, a thought leadership series at the nexus of business, politics, and today literacy. I am thrilled to be back in person right after Labor Day. Kids are back in school. The air is crisp. Feels like a good time to dive into an incredibly important topic on literacy. and we're joined by Andrew Roberts, the president of the Barbara Bush Foundation for Family Literacy. Great to see you. >> Thank you so much for having me. I'm excited to be here. >> And and look, it's always been great to not be on Zoom and be in person. raw_items.title: Literacy
raw_items.summary: Literacy is the ability to read and write, and illiteracy is the inability to read and write.
